'''鈭歴-ng-sh-z''' ('''kasangshezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jolley|jolley]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ng-sh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jolley|jolley]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-ng-sh-z
|-
! Lemma
| kasangshezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
